titles.title: Our Whole Purpose in Being Here (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our whole purpose in being here Is to spread the good news Our whole purpose in being here is to shine And as the moon reflects the sun We reflect the Son of God Our whole purpose in being here is to shine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He made the stars in every galaxy the sun and the moon reflects His glory they all in the purpose they were meant to be the sun each day is shining so bright the moon reflects the light in the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A lot of times we wonder why we came to be Our purpose in life seems such a myster but we're all part of God's economy the Son of God is shining so bright and we reflect the light in the night
